title: Short Swords
description: This texture pack shortens all swords in Minecraft  while keeping the vanilla vibe.
body: ![Minecraft short swords with Vanilla look.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/197cb05970a1a76d665dcd5da8adf5a65709330d_0.webp)This texture pack shortens all vanilla swords in Minecraft, giving them a cleaner look. It keeps the original vanilla style while improving screen visibility, making it great for PvP and everyday gameplay.
